overall.description: Static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a wide river, red truss bridge, industrial skyline with smokestacks, and dense urban architecture under bright midday sun. The camera remains completely stationary throughout the clip, capturing the atmospheric industrial landscape with no visible movement or action.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic industrial waterfront with river and bridge

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cityscape from a fixed vantage point overlooking the river

entered.detail: Wide river with gentle ripples occupying the foreground of the view
Large red metal truss bridge spanning across the river with industrial supports
Dense cluster of industrial buildings with pipes, smokestacks, and futuristic structures
Concrete riverbank with industrial debris and makeshift structures
Stacked shipping containers and industrial materials along the riverbank
White steam and smoke rising from multiple smokestacks throughout the industrial district
Tall building with visible red signage and neon elements on the left side of the frame

segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a cyberpunk industrial waterfront under bright midday sun. The wide river flows through the foreground with a prominent red truss bridge spanning across it. The far shore is densely packed with industrial buildings emitting steam and smoke, while cargo containers line the near embankment. No movement or action occurs throughout the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a completely static perspective of a cyberpunk industrial waterfront under the glare of a bright midday sun. It begins with a wide view of a river flowing through the foreground, where a prominent red truss bridge spans the water. As the gaze extends toward the far shore, the scene reveals a dense cluster of industrial buildings emitting plumes of steam and smoke. The composition remains fixed, holding the contrast between the cargo containers lining the near embankment and the sprawling urban architecture in the distance.
